company.raw_notes: The homepage at natanitsolutions.com contains exclusively WordPress default/placeholder content: the default 'Hello world!' post, generic Lorem Ipsum-style filler text, and no customisation whatsoever. This indicates the site was very recently set up and has not been built out. No About page, no services page, no pricing, no branding beyond the domain name itself. The org name typed at signup is 'Natan IT Solutions', which suggests an IT services or solutions company, but this is only the name — no content confirms it. Web searches returned no results matching natanitsolutions.com specifically; several superficially similar company names exist (NAT IT Solutions, NAT IT & Digital Marketing Solutions, Nahum Natan Technology Solutions, etc.) but none are verifiably the same entity as this signup. The email address is hr@natanitsolutions.com, which is a Human Resources inbox rather than a founder/executive address.
